pr-evidence/engine-adapter-payload-write.gpt55_review_summary: GPT-5.5 approved the committed diff with no blocking findings; reviewer ran focused engine-probe, public-package, governance, engine-adapter, storage, and diff-check verification and reported no behavior, API, path-safety, legacy wrapper, typing, or scope issues.
scope: document_kv_cache.engine_probe, public document/cachet/legacy facades, engine probe tests, README handoff documentation
verification: poetry run pytest tests/test_engine_probe.py tests/test_public_package.py tests/test_project_governance.py -q; poetry run pytest -q; poetry check; git diff --check origin/main...HEAD
what_changed: Add a public write_engine_adapter_payload helper for validated engine adapter requests.
pr-evidence/engine-adapter-payload-write.why: The documented vLLM/SGLang handoff path previously required callers to manually concatenate and write ready.payload bytes before emitting the handoff record. A helper keeps merged and segmented payload writing consistent with the existing local/DBFS/Unity Catalog payload URI validation used by connector probes.
